hero.title: Production vehicles for filming in Iceland
hero.subtitle: Campers, crew trucks, support vehicles and trailers. Set-ready, winter-proven and delivered to your location.

home.why1Text: Generators, heating, blackout options and power on location. Equipped for shoot days, not holidays.
home.why2Text: Highland tracks, river crossings and winter shoots. Our fleet is specced for Icelandic conditions year-round.
home.why3Text: We bring the vehicles to your set, basecamp or airport pickup, anywhere in Iceland, on your schedule.

catalogue.title: Production vehicles
catalogue.intro: Every vehicle is maintained for production work and can be delivered anywhere in Iceland. No listed prices. Tell us about your shoot and we'll put together an offer.
catalogue.empty: No vehicles in this category yet. Contact us and we'll find a solution.

equipmentCatalogue.title: Production equipment
equipmentCatalogue.intro: Gear that keeps a shoot running, rented alongside the fleet: heating units, tents, safety kit and basecamp furniture. No listed prices. Tell us what you need and we'll put together an offer.
equipmentCatalogue.empty: No equipment in this category yet. Contact us and we'll find a solution.

vehicle.requestIntro: No listed prices, because every production is different. Tell us about your shoot and we'll reply with a tailored offer.

cart.title: Quote request
cart.empty: Your quote list is empty. Add vehicles or equipment and we'll price the whole package for you.
cart.formIntro: Tell us who you are and when you're shooting. We'll reply with one tailored offer for everything on your list.
cart.successText: Thanks! We'll put together an offer for your list and get back to you within one business day.

form.name: Name
form.datesPlaceholder: e.g. 12–24 September, or "3 weeks in October"
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about the production: locations, crew size, what you need on set.
form.successText: Thanks, we'll get back to you within one business day.
form.errorText: The message couldn't be sent. Email us directly at {email} and we'll take it from there.

about.title: The crew behind the wheels
about.p1: Creative Filmmaking rents production vehicles to film and TV crews shooting in Iceland. We started on set ourselves, so the fleet is built around what productions actually need: warm places to rest, reliable power, room for gear and vehicles that don't stop when the weather turns.
about.p2: From highland basecamps to city-centre night shoots, we've supported features, series, commercials and music videos across the country. We know the roads, the river crossings and the forecast, and we plan the logistics with you.
about.p3: Every vehicle is serviced, cleaned and delivered set-ready. If something unexpected comes up mid-shoot, we answer the phone.

contact.title: Let's talk about your production
contact.intro: Send us the outline of your shoot and we'll reply with availability and a tailored offer, usually within one business day.
contact.responseNote: We reply within one business day, faster during production season.

cta.title: Planning a production in Iceland?
cta.text: Tell us what you're shooting and we'll put together the right vehicles and an offer, no obligation.

footer.tagline: Production vehicle rental for film & TV crews shooting in Iceland.

error.title: Scene not found
error.text: This page didn't make the final cut. Head back to the fleet and pick another shot.
